title: Claim
description: Claim schema v1: machine-readable claim citing evidence. claimId = sha256(canonical(claimType, normalizedFields, citedEvidenceIds)).

claimId.description: Deterministic id: sha256(canonical JSON of claimType, normalizedFields, citedEvidenceIds)

claimType.description: Claim type; determines required evidence types per ClaimTypeRules

normalizedFields.description: Type-specific normalized key-value payload; keys and values depend on claimType

citedEvidenceIds.description: Sorted list of evidence node ids this claim cites

citedEntities.description: Sorted list of entity strings (card ids, category names, currency codes)

citedNumbers.description: Sorted list of normalized numeric strings
